name: Button
description: Primary interactive control. Pill-shaped (system-wide rounded-full). Composes with Lucide Icon and an optional Kbd shortcut group. Maps to shadcn/ui Button.

variantConstraints.reason: Link has no icon-only sizes and no keyboard-shortcut affordance. (SP-2 v0.2.0)
Icon-only sizes expose no text/slot booleans — single fixed icon slot only. Confirmed via cell 46:189 walk. (SP-2 v0.2.0)

exposedProps.name: showLeftIcon
exposedProps.description: Reveal the left icon slot. (Replaced by Spinner when state=Loading per SP-5.)

exposedProps.name: showKbdGroup
exposedProps.description: Reveal a trailing keyboard shortcut indicator (Kbd / KbdGroup).

swapDefaults.$comment: SP-5 v0.2.0: state=Loading replaces user-controllable leftIcon with a fixed Spinner instance (Lucide LoaderCircle, animated).

state=Loading.$reason: Loading state hides showLeftIcon from the prop interface and always renders the spinner.

slots.name: label
slots.notes: Per-size typography overrides — see bindings.typography below.

slots.name: kbdGroup
slots.notes: KbdGroup background is variant-aware (Default → custom/bg-background; Secondary+Outline → base/muted). Captured in bindings.kbdGroup.background.

bindings.$comment: All values here are size=default. Per-size overrides in bindings.size below; bindings.size is the source of truth.

clipsContent.$reason: Only the Default variant has overflow-clip set on the container frame. Other variants do not. Confirm in Step 3 across all cells.

bindings.$comment: All bindings reference tokens from data/tokens.json via {path.to.token}. Per-cell resolved values live in Button.variants.json.

radius.$reason: System-wide. Apollo v2 Button is pill across every variant × state × size.

xs.$confirmed: Walked cell 21114:109812. iconSize is 12px raw (no width/w-3 binding visible). Flag for source DS to bind to {width.w-3}.

default.$confirmed: Walked cells 37:930, 37:932, 37:1477. Per-side asymmetric padding: 8 top/bottom + 32 left/right (SP-7).

sm.$typographyNote: Apollo v2 maps size=sm to text-BASE (16/24), not text-sm (14/20) as initially assumed. Walked cell 37:1616.
sm.$iconSizeAuditFinding: Apollo v2 has no width/w-* token at 14px. Either add w-3-5 (14px) OR rebind to closest existing token.

lg.$typographyNote: Apollo v2 maps size=lg to text-XL (20/28), not text-lg (18/28) as initially assumed. Walked cell 37:1658.
lg.$iconSizeNote: Cell emits raw 16px not bound to a token in the cell tree. {height.h-4} is the matching token. Source-DS should explicitly bind.

icon.$widthAuditFinding: Should bind to {width.w-11} but Apollo v2 emits raw 44px. SP-4 flag. Source DS should bind.
icon.$constraint: icon-only — no label slot; single fixed icon. Confirmed via cell 46:189.

icon-sm.$confirmed: Walked cell 18672:198807 (GAP-1 closure). iconSize raw 16px; matches {height.h-4} but cell-level binding absent.

icon-lg.$widthNote: Apollo v2 sets icon-lg width via h-12 token reference rather than declaring it raw or via a w-* token. Anomaly vs other icon-* sizes which hardcode width.
icon-lg.$iconSizeNote: Cell emits raw 24px; matches {width.w-6} or {height.h-6} but cell-level binding absent. NOTE: icon-lg uses LARGER icon (24px) than icon (16px) — non-uniform iconSize scaling.

Link-xs.$notes: Walked-cell-pattern inferred from 60:244. SP-3 v0.2.0: textDecoration applied on TEXT node, NOT via underlined-typography token. Earlier v0.1.0 assumption corrected.

Link-default.$confirmed: Walked at cell 60:244. text-lg typography (NOT text-base as originally assumed). No underline class in code output — textDecoration captured separately per SP-3.

Outline.$tbdStep3: Hover + Pressed fills inferred from shadcn convention — verify per-cell.

Ghost.$tbdStep3: Verify Pressed fill matches Hover or has its own token.

Link.$reason: Link has no fill — text-only with underline.

color.$confirmed: GAP-5 closed via cell 112:1310 (Outline/default/Disabled). Disabled border = muted-foreground, NOT primary nor primary-disabled.

Outline.$confirmedDisabled: GAP-5 closed via cell 112:1310 — Disabled text-color = muted-foreground (matches Disabled border color).

focus-ring.$reason: Destructive uses tinted destructive ring; all others share the neutral outline ring. Confirm via Step 3 walk of state=Focus cells.

background.Secondary: base/muted (token not present in tokens.json scope; needs Step 1 supplement)
background.Outline: base/muted (token not present in tokens.json scope; needs Step 1 supplement)
background.$specPatch: Apollo v2 KbdGroup references `base/muted` and `custom/bg-background-20-dark:bg-background-10` — neither was returned by get_variable_defs on node 37:931. Either (a) the slot variables come from a wider scope; or (b) get_variable_defs missed them. Investigate in Step 1 supplement before Step 3.

kbdGroup.borderRadius: border-radius/rounded-sm (6px, not in current tokens.json — Step 1 supplement)

touchTargetCompliance.$auditFinding: Sizes below 44×44 violate WCAG 2.5.5. Recorded as audit signal; bundle preserves actual heights.

a11y.loadingDoublePreventionContract: Loading state MUST disable click + set aria-busy=true. Confirm Step 3 captures aria-busy node attribute if present.

quality.$comment: SP-6 v0.2.0: extractor MUST fetch each perVariantUrl, verify HTTP 200 + URL fragment exists, and emit results here.

verificationFailures.auditFinding: Apollo v2 Link variant's documentationLink in Figma points to '#ghost'. Likely copy-paste miswire when authoring the variant. Source DS should fix.

codeConnect.$note: Apollo v2 documentationLinks already point to shadcn. Strong Code Connect target.

$step2_known_gaps.field: bindings.size.*.padding-x / padding-y / iconSize / gap for sm, lg, icon-xs, icon-sm, icon-lg
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: CLOSED (2026-05-15 post-smoke-test-3). Walked cells 37:1616 (sm), 37:1658 (lg), 21114:109936 (icon-xs), 18672:198807 (icon-sm), 18672:202554 (icon-lg). All size-axis sub-bindings now resolved. Discovered: sm uses text-base typography (not text-sm), lg uses text-xl (not text-lg), icon-lg uses 24px icon (not 16px). Surprise mappings logged inline.

$step2_known_gaps.field: bindings.fill.Outline.Hover/Pressed, bindings.fill.Ghost.Pressed, all Link text-color states
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: v0.2.0 patched Loading fills (primary-hover/secondary-hover/destructive-hover). Outline/Ghost/Link Hover/Pressed inferred from shadcn convention; verify in full-extraction pass.
v0.2.0 CLOSED. 5 nested-instance tokens backfilled to tokens.json with sourceTrace markers per SP-8.
v0.2.0 CLOSED. Cell 60:103 walked: bg=primary-hover; leftIcon slot replaced by Spinner (Lucide LoaderCircle) per SP-5 swapDefaults.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Border behavior on Outline Disabled (does border color shift to disabled token?)
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: CLOSED (2026-05-15). Cell 112:1310 walked. Outline Disabled: border AND text both use {color.base.muted-foreground} (#737373). Background stays at default custom/background-dark-input-30. Patched bindings.border.Outline.color per-state map + bindings.text-color.Outline.Disabled.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Per-cell clipsContent — only Default variant had overflow-clip in sampled cells.
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: v0.2.0 spec patched (SP-7): clipsContent MUST be emitted on every container node. Per-cell true/false captured in variants.json.

$step2_known_gaps.field: iconSize hardcoded on multiple sizes (12px on xs/icon-xs, 14px on sm, 16px on default/sm/lg/icon-sm, 24px on icon-lg)
$step2_known_gaps.resolution: OPEN. Apollo v2 has {width.w-3}=12, {width.w-4}=16, {width.w-6}=24 tokens. iconSize emits raw px not via these tokens. Audit Finding 4 candidate — see audit-findings-for-source.md for action (not a bundle gap; source-DS-side fix).

$spec_patches_v0_2_0.$status: APPLIED to BUNDLE_SPEC.md v0.2.0 — see §17 changelog. SP-1 through SP-8.
$summary: SP-7: clipsContent always emitted; bindings.size all 7 fields mandatory
SP-8: nested-instance token scope (Kbd → 5 tokens backfilled)
